metadata.purpose: Consolidate skill coverage from 3 benchmark repositories (antigravity, awesome-copilot, MiniMax) to guide Agentic-Senior-Core skill platform development

benchmark_repos.name: antigravity-awesome-skills
benchmark_repos.strength: Reasoning chains, anti-patterns, debugging pedagogy, LLM/AI systems, skill routing/bundling

benchmark_repos.name: awesome-copilot
benchmark_repos.strength: Architecture standards, clean code laws, multi-language instruction sets, plugin orchestration, SoC patterns

benchmark_repos.name: MiniMax-AI/skills
benchmark_repos.strength: Document generation sophistication, multimodal/media generation, mobile frameworks (Flutter/RN/iOS/Android), design systems, AI/LLM capabilities

awesome_copilot.unique: SoC principles applied to UI, state management decision frameworks

minimax.unique: Creative patterns, anti-patterns for slop, multimodal asset integration, aesthetic rules

gaps_to_fill: Micro-frontend architecture (all repos light on this)
Responsive design framework beyond media queries
our_above_line: Unified design system → code → deployed component library workflow
Anti-slop enforcer with measurable aesthetic rules
Automated accessibility audit with auto-remediation suggestions
Performance budgeting integrated from design phase
Component API contract validation (props, variants, logic)

awesome_copilot.unique: SoC layer separation, database governance, schema-first thinking

minimax.unique: Django-specific rules, document generation backend integration, 6-gate release checklist

our_above_line: Database schema evolution with zero-downtime migration validator
Event-driven architecture decision tree (monolith vs saga vs event sourcing)
Observability-first backend architecture (OpenTelemetry integration)
API versioning & contract testing framework
GraphQL vs REST decision matrix with migration path

awesome_copilot.unique: Monorepo vs microservices framework, OpenAPI 3.1 mandatory

minimax.unique: Concrete project structure, 6-gate verification checklist, multi-framework coverage

our_above_line: API contract enforcement at build time (Zod + OpenAPI + tests)
Feature flag decision tree with canary deployment guide
Cross-service type safety (validate at API boundary, not endpoint)
Monolith→microservices strangler fig with risk calculator
Unified logging/tracing/metrics stack initialization
Interactive CLI initialization with live-reload preview
Configuration validator & fix suggestions
Skill selector CLI with auto-detection
Automated upgrade CLI with dry-run & rollback
Plugin ecosystem for skill extensions
Automated changelog + breaking change detection (git history analysis)
Multi-platform publish automation (npm, PyPI, crate, GemRegistry)
Version compatibility matrix validator (prevent diamond dependency)
Rollback automation with health checks
SBOM generation + supply chain security integration

antigravity.unique: Pedagogical review approach, security halt, reasoning clause enforcement

awesome_copilot.unique: Separate checklists (architecture, security, performance, not just PR gate)

our_above_line: AI-assisted code review with benchmark comparison (detect regressions vs 3 repos)
Automated security vulnerability scanner + remediation suggestions
Performance regression gate (before/after benchmarks, SLO enforcement)
Accessibility auto-audit + remediation
Dependency audit with license compliance checking

missing_coverage: Mobile development (iOS/Android/Flutter/React Native) - only in MiniMax, weak elsewhere
Multimodal/Media generation - only in MiniMax (TTS, music, video, image)
Document generation (docx, pdf, pptx) - only in MiniMax
Observability/Tracing - all repos light on this

our_expansion_domains.why: MiniMax has strong foundation, we can add testing/CI/CD/distribution layers
MiniMax has API docs, we can add prompt engineering patterns + error handling
None of 3 repos strong, critical for production systems

common_bugs: Not stopping at 3+ failures → architectural problem (antigravity)
Poor error messages hindering root cause analysis
debugging.our_solution: Systematic debugging framework with architectural redesign trigger + typed error codes

common_bugs: Performance: unnecessary re-renders, N+1 component updates
frontend.our_solution: Smart/Dumb component enforcer + CSS module validator + render profiler + slop detector

backend.our_solution: Dependency graph auditor + query optimizer + secret scanner + schema validation enforcer

architecture.our_solution: Evolutionary design checklist + strangler fig migration guide + living docs mandate

security.our_solution: Security halt protocol + migration validator + input sanitizer rules

tier_strategy.standard: Match minimum coverage of 3 repos (fallback only)
tier_strategy.advance: Exceed 2 out of 3 repos in depth + add reasoning chains (default)
tier_strategy.expert: Exceed all 3 repos + add cross-repo patterns + pain point solutions
tier_strategy.above: Add unique insights: automation, enforcement, cross-cutting patterns + new domains (mobile, multimodal, observability)

phase_4.name: Expansion Domains (Weeks 6-8)
phase_4.per_domain: New domains with full tier structure
